title: Bring Back Luck
body:
[![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) [![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/BoyPika/bring-back-luck)

[![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_vector.svg)](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/client/) [![quilted-fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

Adds a way to make luck and unluck potions

## Crafting recipe for Lucky Clover

![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/52831958/244895110-af552448-fca9-4be7-a376-9687cfbcb7b4.png)

You can also find clovers around the world

### Look at the wiki for the potion recipes

[![crowdin](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/translate/crowdin_vector.svg)](https://crwd.in/bring-back-luck)
